architecture.summary: Hardcoded fallback with real production values; stale-while-revalidate via updatedAt timestamp; cron in separate ctx.waitUntil

ux.summary: No stale indicator, just show numbers normally

deployment.summary: Hardcoded fallback sufficient, no deployment script changes

caching.summary: Remove KV TTL, manage freshness via updatedAt; serve any real data over zeros

reliability.summary: Separate ctx.waitUntil for refreshPlatformStats; background refresh on stale
